title: Urban Company is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Urban Company is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Urban Company family as a Full Stack Developer in Ghaziabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Urban Company:
Urban Company is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Urban Company!
